ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline Approaching
ham.body:
Hi [Name],

Just a quick reminder that the semester project submission deadline is next Monday, 15th September. Please ensure you submit your project report and code repository by 11:59 PM on that day. If you have any questions or need clarification, feel free to reach out.

Best,
[Professor Name]
Department of Computer Science

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required - Gift Card Request
spam.body:
Dear [Name],

I hope you are doing well. I am the CEO of XYZ Pvt Ltd and due to an urgent business matter, I need you to send me a gift card worth INR 20,000 as soon as possible. This is for a corporate event and must be processed by 5 PM today. Please confirm receipt and send the gift card details at your earliest convenience.

Thank you for your prompt cooperation.

Regards,
[CEO Name]
Chief Executive Officer
XYZ Pvt Ltd
